note: Tier audit straggler (Bossing A). Stage effects 'trigger repeatedly' (cumulative): S2 stage-3 entry FB extension +2+3 -> flat +3s average per rotation ⚑ (early +5, late +2). Per-FB-normal-cast proc: Time Ext I+II are cumulative 52.04+85.02=137.06 early, 52.04 late -> averaged 100 per cast, fbGate inFb ⚑. Burst: 628.7% nuke always; the >=30-chip ATK 65.25/15s only realistically on the FIRST burst (everyN 99 offset 1 = once); hit-rate stage inert. REVIEW-RECONCILED: chip economy math confirmed (net-negative, starts 50, -17/burst, ~+15 per 2 rotations); first-burst-only >=30 gate and +3s avg extension stand.
